channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub trending repositories

item.title: google-ai-edge / gallery
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 16,889 → 17,419 (+530) | Ranked #1
A gallery that showcases on-device ML/GenAI use cases and allows people to try and use models locally.
Language: Kotlin 389 stars today

item.title: Blaizzy / mlx-vlm
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 3,907 → 4,062 (+155) | Ranked #2
MLX-VLM is a package for inference and fine-tuning of Vision Language Models (VLMs) on your Mac using MLX.
Language: Python 416 stars today

item.title: siddharthvaddem / openscreen
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 22,467 → 23,201 (+734) | Ranked #3
Create stunning demos for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, and free for commercial use. An alternative to Screen Studio.
Language: TypeScript 2,749 stars today

item.title: block / goose
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 36,962 → 37,487 (+525) | Ranked #4
an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM
Language: Rust 882 stars today

item.title: onyx-dot-app / onyx
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 24,993 → 25,292 (+299) | Ranked #5

item.title: badlogic / pi-mono
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 31,902 → 32,134 (+232) | Ranked #6
